issues.msg: Your submission is missing few key attributes: product_benefit, specific_uses_for_product. Missing these attributes do not block your product from being displayed on Amazon. However it impacts the overall quality of your listing.

The Listing data provided is different from what's already in the Amazon catalogue. The item_id provided matches ASIN B0DTPR8QPM but some of the listing data contradicts what is already in the Amazon catalogue. The following listing attribute value(s) conflict with Amazon catalogue value(s): 'manufacturer' (Merchant [en_IN: "PR Herbal – Nature’s Promise in Every Dose."] / Amazon [en_IN: "LibidSafe Elevating Wellness With Innovative Products for a Better You"]). To fix the issue, please follow these steps 1) If the product you are listing is the same as B0DTPR8QPM, then update your listing's 'manufacturer' attribute(s) to match Amazon's catalog value, 2) If it's not the right ASIN, make sure the item_id provided is correct, or 3) If you disagree with the data in Amazon catalog contact Selling Partner Support to start the appeal process.
